title: Reports and Publications - Special Access to Drugs and Health Products - Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports and Publications: Special Access to Drugs and Health Products - Health Canada
Health Canada, through its Special Access Programme (SAP), allows doctors to gain access to non-marketed drugs and medical devices that have not yet been approved for sale in Canada.
This section contains links to reports and publications related to special access to drugs & health products.
- Medical Devices - Fact Sheet
